name: The Seventh Finger
author: Qaday
bootlegger: Every Good player has the Magician ability.
If the Hatter dies, Legion wakes and chooses a living player to gain a Minion ability of that player's choice.
A player with the Spy ability does not get to see the Grimoire. However, they might register as the opposite alignment, or as a character of the opposite alignment, even if dead.
The Alchemist-Boffin chooses a player each night: they learn if that player is affected by the Boffin ability.
